tags: Scores higher for more recent notes by targetPubkey.
content:
plan
  notes = do 'nostr.query' {kinds: [1], authors: [_.targetPubkey], since: _.now - 604800}
in
let
  events = notes | [],
  n = length(events)
in
if n >= 30 then 1.0
else if n >= 20 then 0.9
else if n >= 12 then 0.75
else if n >= 6 then 0.55
else if n >= 2 then 0.3
else if n >= 1 then 0.15
else 0.0
